text:
List (, rom. Risuto) is a spell card found in the Greed Island game. It allows the caster to view the number of other players currently in possession of a target card and the number of copies in use.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This spell allows the user to view how many people are currently in possession of any one target card, as well as the total number of copies of that card in circulation, so as to verify whether the card has reached its maximum conversion limit and work out one's priorities. It requires the number of the target card to be stated out loud.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1038 :: 
対象アイテムを１種指定し、現在そのアイテムカードを所有している人数とカードの合計枚数を知ることができる。
|-
![Eng]
|No.1038 :: List 
Specify 1 target item, and you are able to know that current card's sum number of ownership and the specific people.
|}

Trivia

"List" was first seen being used - three times - in Chapter 154 by some members of Kazsule's Alliance on cards no. 75, 9 (by Hanse), and 2 (by Montreux).
